summary.text: MATERA AI assessment for this patient is SEVERE (composite score 1.000). Blood pressure of 165/100 exceeds the ACOG Stage 2 hypertension threshold (>=160/>=110). Four symptoms were detected and a preeclampsia pattern was identified - epigastric pain, headache, nausea, and visual disturbance accompanying elevated blood pressure - and a preeclampsia flag is raised for elevated risk indicators. A confidence-weighted downgrade to Moderate was considered but not applied (confidence 0.40 < 0.5); gestational stage is unknown.

_note: Live example (real Jason Argonaut MATERA consult; run WITHOUT --mock). Hand-written summary that stands in for an Epic GenAI summary, grounded in the actual note content. Faithful + medically sound, including the not-applied confidence downgrade -> should score high across all dimensions.
